mano_cua.result_summary: Modal弹窗无法打开，点击Open Modal按钮后无任何弹窗显示，控制台报错Uncaught Error: Wrap your app in the SvelteUIProvider，Modal组件找不到SvelteUIProvider上下文导致功能完全失效
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Clicked Open Modal button twice, Modal popup never appeared. Console shows error: Uncaught (in promise) Error: Wrap your app in the SvelteUIProvider, or provide a sufficent target throught the target prop (Modal.svelte:41:15). The Modal component cannot find SvelteUIProvider context in the documentation site, causing Modal to fail completely. Additionally, the code example shows Modal content is just HTML comment <!-- Modal Content -->.
